description: Animate copying content from a source text object to a destination position, preserving both originals. A clone moves from source to destination over 2 seconds.
utility: Copy content from source to target position, target stays visible

arguments.name: target
arguments.description: Destination text object or position variable

alternates.description: Copy source content to target position

examples.scenario: Copy label equation to write position for working (axis intercepts lesson)
Copy expanded product into combined expression with deferred parallel play (diameter through center lesson)
Copy expanded first product into combined form (circle from diameter lesson)
Copy expanded second product into combined form (circle from diameter lesson)
Copy coefficient values into vertex formula with font size override
Copy 6 triangle labels to anchor positions in parallel with deferred play
Copy rearranged terms into new equation using deferred parallel play
